title: Unable to see my own private dashboard when I add it into a table widget
excerpt: I have a dashboard set up in the work management section of Monday where I have pulled in other tables from unlocked boards and can see them fine. When I first made my dashboard I had also pulled in a private board of my…

posts.author: Liamground (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a dashboard set up in the work management section of Monday where I have pulled in other tables from unlocked boards and can see them fine. When I first made my dashboard I had also pulled in a private board of my own which was working fine but over the last few days it won’t show me the contents on the board when it is grouped with the unlocked boards as it seems to think I don’t have permissions even though it’s my own.

Thanks,

posts.author: Liamground (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using table widgets for more context

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Liamground,
Could you try duplicating the table widget and(or) the entire dashboard, and then checking to see if the content shows up.

posts.author: Liamground (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml: Turns out it was happening because when I turned on a filter for the other boards on my custom table I use for my to do list I hadn’t had my tasks assigned to me so it wouldnt show
